title: Instrument d'adhésion

pages.text:
MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

OF THE ISLAMIC REPUBLIC OF IRAN

IN THE NAME OF GOD

THE COMPASSIONATE, THE MERCIFUL

No. 641/1153

WHEREAS, the Convention relating to International Exhibitions, done at

Paris on 28 November 1928; and supplemented by the Protocols of 10

May 1948, 16 November 1966, 30 November 1972 and the Amendment of 24 June 1982 and the Amendment of 31 May 1988, remains open for the accession of states;

AND WHEREAS, the formalities of accession to the said Convention as revised, have been completed in conformity with the Constitution of the

Islamic Republic of Iran;

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Islamic Republic of Iran, having considered and approved the aforementioned Convention as revised, hereby accedes to the same and undertakes faithfully to fulfil and carry out the stipulations therein contained;

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, 1, Kamal Kharrazi, Minister of Foreign

Affairs of the Islamic Republic of Iran, have signed this Instrument of

Accession.

Tehran, 29 May 2002

Dr. Kamał Kharrazi

Mistero Foreign Appairs of the Islamic Republic/of Iran
